data.title: ARBOR Launches COMX-C710 AI Module Powered by AMD Ryzen™ AI Embedded X100 Processors for Robotics and Physical AI Applications
data.description: On July 23, 2026, ARBOR Technology Corp. unveiled its latest COM-HPC module, the COMX-C710. This module is equipped with the latest AMD Ryzen™ AI Embedded X100 Series processors. The COMX-C710 is aimed at industries such as robotics, medical, and industrial automation. The module will be showcased at the upcoming AMD Advancing event.
ALLIANZ TO BUY HSBC LIFE SINGAPORE FOR $2.1B

data.title: Monk Launches Voice Collections, Bringing AI Phone Calls and Callbacks to Accounts Receivable
data.description: Julia, the collections agent for Monk, now has the ability to make outbound collection calls and address inbound Accounts Receivable queries through a special business line. This new feature enables finance teams to utilize the most effective collection method without the need to hire additional staff. To see Voice Collections in action, watch the multimedia demonstration showcasing this innovative solution.

data.title: China Pharma Holdings, Inc. Announces Closing of $5.0 Million Registered Direct Offering
data.description: In Haikou, China, on July 23, 2026, China Pharma Holdings, Inc. (NYSE American: CPHI), a specialized pharmaceuticals firm in China, disclosed the completion of its registered direct offering of 2,500,000 shares.

data.title: Sensient Declares Dividend
data.description: In Milwaukee, the Board of Directors of Sensient Technologies Corporation (NYSE: SXT) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.41 per share for its common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on September 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of August 3, 2026. Sensient Technologies Corporation, known for its colors, flavors, and specialty ingredients, is a prominent global producer. Leveraging advanced technologies and a strong worldwide presence, Sensient is a key player in its industry.
DISH and its subsidiaries start prepackaged restructuring to repay debt early and finalize transition of DISH Wireless sector.

data.title: Polymarket odds drop to 51.5% for normal Hormuz traffic by year-end. Trump warns of big strikes on Iran after Gulf attacks. Strait closed since Feb.
data.description: A recent report reveals that President Donald Trump has issued a warning about potential strikes on Iran, which would be the most significant thus far, following retaliatory assaults in the Gulf region. The situation has escalated to the point where the vital Strait of Hormuz has been inoperative since the end of February.

data.title: Youngstown Innovation Hub Breaks Ground at YBI's 107 Building
data.description: In Youngstown, Ohio, on July 23, 2026, the Youngstown Innovation Hub for Aerospace & Defense commenced the construction of YBI's 107 Building in downtown Youngstown. This initiative supports the United States' efforts to enhance its aerospace and defense manufacturing sector, solidifying the region's position in this industry.

data.title: Hampton to Issue Shares for Debt
data.description: On June 30, 2026, Hampton Financial Corporation revealed plans to issue 351,914 subordinate voting shares at $0.335 per share to a debenture holder as part of a debt settlement agreement. The total principal amount of the debentures is $5.2 million, with the shares being issued to settle a quarterly interest payment totaling $117,891.12. The debt settlement is set to be finalized on June 30, 2026, pending approval from the TSX Venture Exchange.

data.title: VYLIT OPENS ITS CREATOR ADVISORY BOARD, GIVING CREATORS EQUITY IN THE PLATFORM
data.description: Three well-known personalities, including reality star Dom DeAngelis, model Cydney Moreau, and entrepreneur Crystal Jackson, have been unveiled as founding members of Vylit, a new platform focused on creators above 18 years old. The initiative allows aspiring creators to play a role in shaping the platform's future. The announcement was made on July 23, 2026, with applications currently being accepted for those interested in joining the platform.

data.title: House of Doge Completes Merger with Brag House Holdings and Set to Trade on Nasdaq Under Ticker "HODO"
data.description: DogeCoin Foundation's corporate entity, House of Doge (NASDAQ: HODO), successfully finalizes its merger with Brag House Holdings. This move sees House of Doge officially listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange.

data.title: CNBC Names PayJoy one of the World's Top FinTech Companies of 2026
data.description: PayJoy, a consumer finance leader in emerging markets, was recently honored by CNBC and Statista by being named one of the "World's Top Fintech Companies 2026." This recognition showcases PayJoy's expertise in digital funding and bank-independent lending. The accolade solidifies PayJoy's position in the industry, emphasizing its success in catering to the needs of consumers in growing markets. The company's innovative approach has propelled it to the forefront of the fintech sector, aligning with the evolving financial landscape.

data.title: UPAY Inc. Announces Petra Software Transaction
data.description: In Dallas on June 30, 2026, UPAY Inc. (OTCQB: UPYY), a technology company specializing in fintech, compliance, software platforms, and digital infrastructure, has successfully finalized a restructuring deal. The transaction involved Petra Software (Pty) Ltd (“Petra SA”), Petra Software LLC (“Petra USA”), and Acheron Systems (Pty) Ltd (“Acheron”).

data.title: Minerals Technologies Inc. Files Plan of Reorganization in BMI OldCo Chapter 11 Cases to Comply with Court Deadline
data.description: On June 29, 2026, Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE: MTX) revealed the submission of a Plan of Reorganization, termed the "Parent Plan." This plan was filed in the Chapter 11 cases of its subsidiaries, including BMI OldCo Inc. (formerly Barretts Minerals Inc.), and affiliated debtors. These cases are currently being heard in the U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of Texas. The announcement was made by MTI, a prominent technology-focused specialty minerals enterprise, along with certain affiliates known as the "Non-Debtor Affiliates."

data.title: Sealaska Completes Major Flood Protection Project Ahead of August Glacial Flood Threat
data.description: A team of 60 individuals has successfully finished a crucial flood mitigation effort in Juneau, Alaska. The workforce installed over 14,000 feet of barriers and placed close to 113,000 tons of rock along the Mendenhall River to safeguard the local communities. The project was completed on July 23, 2026, by Sealaska.
